# Katanas
# https://revenge-of-the-fallen-rotmg.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Katanas&prop=wikitext

This page includes both custom katanas and old katanas that have been edited from how they appear on the predicting RotMG server.
{| class="article-table"
!Katanas
!Damage
!Range
!RoF
!Shots
!Stats
!Pierce
!Armor Pierce
!Obstacle Pierce
!Fame Bouns
!Tier
!Legendary/Primal
Effects
|-
|Sadamune
|150-190
|5.01
|
|
|
|yes
|
|
|5%
|T13
|
|-
|Kusanagi
|160-200
|5.01
|
|
|
|yes
|
|
|6%
|T14
|
|-
|Stardust Cutter
|170-210
|5.01
|
|
|
|yes
|
|
|6%
|GL
|
|-
|Molten Katana
|180-240
|4.2
|75%
|
|
|
|yes
|
|7%
|Heroic
|
|-
|Himura's Katana
|120-160
|4
|130%
|
|
|
|
|
|5%
|Unique
|
|-
|Acid Katana
|100-135
|4.8
|160%
|
|
|
|
|
|5%
|Heroic
|
|-
|Doom Katana
|250-335
|5.8
|55%
|
|
|
|
|
|5%
|Heroic
|
|-
|Broken Branch
|85-135
|5.2
|70%
|2
|<nowiki>+6att</nowiki>
+4dex
|yes
|
|
|5%
|Artifact
|
|-
|Windkutter
|220-255
|5.6
|120%
|
|<nowiki>+3spd</nowiki>
+3dex
|yes
|yes
|yes
|6%
|Legendary
|Last Hope
|-
|Asura
|125-150
|5
|125%
|3
|<nowiki>-3def</nowiki>
+3spd
|yes
|
|yes
|8%
|Legendary
|Curse
|-
|Useless Katana
|10-30
|3.5
|
|
|
|
|
|
|
|Legendary
|Curse
|-
|Ray Katana
|190
|6.12
|
|
|
|yes
|yes
|
|3%
|Legendary
|Curse
|-
|Sullen Blade
|40-120
|3.75
|
|3
|
|
|
|
|4%
|Legendary
|Angel's Touch
|-
|Void Blade
|600-700
|0
|30%
|
|<nowiki>-5dex</nowiki>
|yes
|
|
|6%
|Legendary
|Angel's Touch
|-
|Doku no Ken
|190-240
|5.2
|140%
|
|
|yes
|
|
|5%
|Legendary
|Curse
|}
